name: The Last Spin
short_description: The last spin originally named 'Casino?' is a deck-building roguelike that disguises itself as a slot machine. How many spins until the last spin?
detailed_description:
SPIN, WIN, SPIN, WIN, SPIN, PAY, REPEAT

Very simple roguelike with a non-standard progression system. Unlock additional cards and items with tokens unlocked as you play.

Mysterious 'Casino'-like setting. Will you survive long enough to win it big?

75 mostly unique cards. There's a lot of cats, but they are cute.

45 mostly unique items. Why isn't there 50? These were difficult to come up with tbh.

This is my first real attempt at making a game, so please let me know any ways to improve this game. I am already working on some future content!
